title: Nonlinear Dynamics, Stability, and Control · Model Lens: Equilibria Stability
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving controlled nonlinear systems. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math adv equilibria stability increment in a reproducible dynamical systems computational study. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Derive equilibria stability in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Formulate phase portraits in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
